operations_log.action: Complete Phase 2.5 - PC Client & APK Build Setup
operations_log.description: Created beautiful Tkinter PC Desktop Client containing system status monitors, active context simulator, and floating transparent Windows subtitle overlays. Set up full Android Gradle project layout (build.gradle, settings.gradle) and an automated build batch compiler (build_apk.bat) producing app-debug.apk under Windows. Committed and pushed successfully.

Created and synchronized mybizcon_chronicle.md inside the project workspace directory to preserve full context history, dialog archives, technical choices, and environment setup guidelines for immediate replication on any other PC. Committed and pushed successfully.
